subcodes.first_line: O Qasim! At all times hath the glance of divine favor been directed towards thee and the other friends, but after [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا قاسم در جمیع احیان لحاظ عنایت الهی بتو و سایر دوستان متوجه ولکن بعد از
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @absolute freedom; independence of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity
